game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Guns'n'Glory Premium:** Players deploy and reposition mobile bandit units along predefined paths to ambush waves of pioneer enemies like settlers and stagecoaches, preventing them from escaping the map. Units automatically attack enemies within their specific range (e.g., 50 pixels), dealing damage based on their type, while players can tap a unit and then a new location to manually move it or pursue escaping targets. Defeating enemies awards gold, which is spent in a UI menu to recruit new unit types (e.g., Crazy Mexicans, Brave Indians) or upgrade existing units' damage output by 15% or range by 10 pixels. Progression involves completing levels across distinct regions like Alaska and Nevada, where enemy waves increase in number and health (e.g., settlers 10 HP, stagecoaches 50 HP), and failure occurs if more than 10 enemies reach the map exit. Power-ups, such as temporary attack boosts, can be collected from defeated special enemies or as level rewards, adding tactical depth to the core loop of placement, upgrading, and defense.
game_info.description: Deploy and reposition mobile bandit units along paths to ambush waves of pioneer enemies. Stop settlers and stagecoaches from escaping by strategically placing units within their attack range. Earn gold from defeated enemies to recruit new unit types and upgrade damage or range. Complete levels across different regions as enemy waves grow stronger. Don't let more than 10 enemies escape!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected unit or navigate UI menu
Space: Select/confirm unit or menu action
Shift: Cancel selection or close menu
Z: Open upgrade/recruit menu
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic game mechanics including unit selection, movement, enemy spawning, and attacking. This validates that the core gameplay loop functions correctly with units engaging enemies within range.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Deploy initial units near the path exit. Select units and move them to intercept enemies. Allow automated combat to occur. Test that gold is earned and enemies are defeated before reaching the exit.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Units successfully attack and defeat enemies. Gold accumulates from kills. No critical errors occur during basic gameplay. The game remains playable and responsive throughout the test duration.

TEST_1.expected: Units successfully attack and defeat enemies. Gold accumulates from kills. No critical errors occur during basic gameplay. The game remains playable and responsive throughout the test duration.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the complete win condition by successfully defending against all enemy waves across multiple levels. This validates progression mechanics, unit upgrading, and level completion.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy units strategically along the path. Upgrade units when gold is available to increase effectiveness. Move units to intercept enemies efficiently. Purchase new units as needed. Complete all waves without letting more than 10 enemies escape.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all waves in the level. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Validate that unit upgrades improve performance. Confirm that strategic placement and timing lead to victory.
